title: DomainConfig
description: Domain configuration: detection rules, verification adapters, review experts.

name.description: Domain identifier: code, 1c, research, or custom name.

label.description: Human-readable domain label for CLI output.

detect.description: Detection rules — how to recognise this domain in a project root.

extensions.description: File extensions. At least one must match a file in the project tree.

files.description: Specific filenames. Match = strong signal (any depth in tree).

directories.description: Directory names. Match any subtree, not just root.

match.description: any = detect if any rule matches; all = all rules must match.

adapters.description: Verification adapters provided by this domain.

experts.description: Review experts. Key = expert name (used in review run).

method.description: Unique method name: go_test, pytest, 1c_syntax_check, shell, manual, none.

run.description: Shell command template. ${WORKTRAIL_SCOPE} expands to --scope value. If omitted, a built-in runner is used.

scope.description: Default scope for this adapter (file path, directory glob, or package pattern).

prompt.description: Prompt for the expert reviewer. Injected as the system prompt for the review sub-agent.

blockers.description: Can this expert issue blockers? false = warnings only (informational expert).
